mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN f.user_code = #{userCode} THEN f.friend_code ELSE f.user_code END AS friend_code, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatar, m.content AS last_message, m.type AS last_msg_type, DATE_FORMAT(m.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS last_msg_time, IFNULL(unread.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count FROM friend_relation f JOIN users u ON u.public_id = (CASE WHEN f.user_code = #{userCode} THEN f.friend_code ELSE f.user_code END) LEFT JOIN chat_message m ON m.id = ( SELECT id FROM chat_message WHERE (sender = (CASE WHEN f.user_code = #{userCode} THEN f.friend_code ELSE f.user_code END) AND receiver = #{userCode}) OR (sender = #{userCode} AND receiver = (CASE WHEN f.user_code = #{userCode} THEN f.friend_code ELSE f.user_code END)) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sender, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM chat_message WHERE receiver = #{userCode} AND read_state = 0 GROUP BY sender ) unread ON unread.sender = (CASE WHEN f.user_code = #{userCode} THEN f.friend_code ELSE f.user_code END) WHERE (f.user_code = #{userCode} OR f.friend_code = #{userCode}) AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY last_msg_time DESC;
